No more than 3 credits (1 course) may be taken at the 1xx-level.

No more than 3 credits (1 course) may be fulﬁlled by AP, IB, or transfer

credit.

A student may use a maximum of 6 credits (2 courses) to satisfy

requirements for both a major and a minor. Courses completed for one minor may not be used to satisfy the requirements for another minor.

Any student is eligible to pursue the minor, with the exception of a

student majoring in History.
